form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.24) when fourth over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Has three minors from five starts from box 1. Has ability and should be around the money.

form.formComment: Placed last time (23.07) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 2 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from six starts. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 6 length fifth over 460m at this track. Hard to have this time.
